design_intent.summary: A low-rise, modular, editable, expandable future technology city for later NPC, weather, physics, quest, and gameplay integration.

Terrain.purpose: editable terrain foundation and navigation-friendly ground layers

CityCore.purpose: compact low-rise hub with clear expansion anchors

ModularArchitecture.purpose: repeatable low-rise building modules, workshops, labs, and service blocks

Interiors.purpose: future room modules for workshop and mission spaces

RoadsAndBridges.purpose: roads, walkways, and connecting bridges with modular sockets

EnergyNodes.purpose: interactive energy anchors and city systems hooks

NPCInterface.purpose: reserved data interface for later NPC placement and behavior hooks

GameplayInterface.purpose: reserved task, quest, trigger, and gameplay logic hook

ShotInterface.purpose: reserved camera, shot, preview, and presentation hook

RenderInterface.purpose: reserved render profile, output, and evidence hook

first_build_rule.allowed_when: Only after user authorization and resource preflight.
first_build_rule.scope: tiny blockout: terrain plus two or three low-rise modules plus one energy node
first_build_rule.forbidden: Do not build a full city in the first job.

next_safe_action: Define schema and validation constraints for a tiny low-rise blockout before any UE execution.
